name: faerun-date
description: Canonical Harptos calendar utilities for JavaScript

scripts.release:patch: npm version patch --sign-git-tag && git push && git push --follow-tags && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor --sign-git-tag && git push && git push --follow-tags && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:major: npm version major --sign-git-tag && git push && git push --follow-tags && npm publish --access public

author: Cantilux
